category_sources: source_facts.description says network scanner; official GitHub README at https://github.com/Chleba/netscanner describes a network scanner and diagnostic tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is netscanner; official repository README title and command name use netscanner.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/Chleba/netscanner, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists WiFi scanning, packetdump, pinging CIDR, port scanning, and Rust source; current_curation.tags includes cli.
